themes.label: Wisdom
themes.summary: This chapter points toward wisdom, understanding, discernment, counsel, or instruction. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "Do you see someone wise in their own eyes? There's more hope for a fool than for them. The He...". Word-study detail reinforces "חָכָ֣ם: wise - wise, (i.e., intelligent, skilful or artful)".

themes.label: Faith/Belief
